allow: PowerShell(node -e "const http = require\('http'\); http.get\('http://localhost:3000/api/constants', res => { let d=''; res.on\('data', c => d+=c\); res.on\('end', \(\) => console.log\(d.substring\(0,200\)\)\); }\).on\('error', e => console.log\('Error:', e.message\)\)")

PowerShell(try { $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $tcp.Connect\("127.0.0.1", 27017\); Write-Output "MongoDB is listening on 27017"; $tcp.Close\(\) } catch { Write-Output "MongoDB NOT available on 27017: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
